boundary: This map authorizes future Cube Register rendering channels for indexed K900/P19/P20 action sources. It does not render those sources yet and does not claim physical forces.
principle: Action grammar must enter the Cube Register through declared roles only: caps, side walls, seams, interior, and trace.

compression.boundary: Compression means finite return-path metric compression, not physical gravity.

polarity.boundary: Polarity means finite orientation/circulation residue, not physical electromagnetism.

confinement.source_grammar: internal difference under neutral closure produces confinement
confinement.boundary: Confinement means finite triangle/edge organization, not physical strong force.

transformation.source_grammar: admissible directed channel crossing produces transformation
transformation.boundary: Transformation means finite directed channel crossing, not physical weak interaction.

registered_trace.source_grammar: action leaves queryable aftermath in the register
registered_trace.boundary: Trace means registered aftermath/audit linkage, not measurement itself.

rendering_policy.allowed_next_step: build numeric binding packet from selected P19/P20 artifacts
